headline: Moderna Stock’s 6-Day Rally Ends in a Dive. Why It’s One of the S&P 500’s Biggest Losers Today.
summary: Shares of the vaccine maker have been on a hot streak, most recently catalyzed by a positive update from the FDA.

headline: Moderna’s mRNA flu vaccine passes FDA AdCom, review underway
summary: The panel unanimously said that the benefits of Moderna's mRNA jab outweigh its risks in preventing influenza in certain age groups.
